Package org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator

Class GoalChecker

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.GoalChecker
public abstract class GoalChecker extends Object
The GoalChecker checks whether a given predicate is in a reduced form. Meaning, that set membership is the only set theoretic construct and arithmetic expressions are separated.

    • isInGoal

      public static boolean isInGoal(Predicate pred)
      Checks whether a given predicate is in a reduced form
      Parameters:
      pred - the predicate to be checked
      Returns:
      returns true if the predicate is in a reduced form

    • areBoundDeclsUsed

      private static boolean areBoundDeclsUsed(BoundIdentDecl[] bids, Predicate P)
      Tells whether all bound identifier declarations are actually used in the given predicate.
      Parameters:
      bids - array of declarations to check for use
      P - predicate where bound identifiers should appear
      Returns:
      true iff all bound identifiers do occur in the given predicate
